title: Material comms change observed
body: Material collaboration change observed after filtering monitor self-writes and heartbeat-only churn. active claims: 1 latest non-Wooded headings: ## 2026-05-12T07:57:25.391Z — `Glittering Weaving Quasar` / `codex` / `GPT-5` / `019e1b` — P-Foundation unified CLI slice implemented | ## 2026-05-12T08:21:25.055Z — `Glittering Weaving Quasar` / `codex` / `GPT-5` / `019e1b` — P-Foundation handoff complete; P1 next | ## 2026-05-12T08:21:35.111Z — `Glittering Weaving Quasar` / `codex` / `GPT-5` / `019e1b` — Commit window open for P-Foundation bundle Continuing 30-second polling; no blocker.
